listing.interview_style_summary: 1:1 structured behavioural interview focused on past actions; trained alumni or admissions; ~45–60 minutes; deep probing.
listing.unique_hook: All admits interview; emphasis on recent meaningful professional/community experiences; depth over breadth (per handoff report).
listing.interviewer_profile: Alumni subset or MBA Admissions team
listing.practice_mechanics: Up to 6 prompts · default 90s prep / 8 min answer · weighted picks from 50-prompt programme bank · video/Kira/written-style prompts use shorter timers in-session

listing.interview_style_summary: 1:1 application-based interview tailored to your file; ~30 minutes.
listing.unique_hook: Post-Interview Reflection due within 24 hours (guidance often cited as ~300–450 words).
listing.interviewer_profile: MBA Admissions Board member who reviewed your application
listing.practice_mechanics: Up to 5 prompts · default 45s prep / 5 min answer · weighted picks from 50-prompt programme bank · video/Kira/written-style prompts use shorter timers in-session

listing.interview_style_summary: Team Based Discussion ~35 minutes + ~10 minute 1:1 reflection.
listing.unique_hook: Group exercise evaluating collaboration, communication, leadership in a team setting.
listing.practice_mechanics: Up to 6 prompts · default 45s prep / 5 min answer · weighted picks from 50-prompt programme bank · video/Kira/written-style prompts use shorter timers in-session

listing.interview_style_summary: 1:1 behavioural interview; virtual per official guidance in handoff.
listing.unique_hook: Pre-interview short-answer + PDF (data visualisation or data-driven decision slide) due shortly before interview.
listing.practice_mechanics: Up to 6 prompts · default 45s prep / 4m15s answer · weighted picks from 50-prompt programme bank · video/Kira/written-style prompts use shorter timers in-session

listing.interview_style_summary: 1:1 conversational interview; time for your questions.
listing.unique_hook: Single required interview; student, alum, or staff weighted equally in evaluation.
listing.practice_mechanics: Up to 6 prompts · default 60s prep / 9 min answer · weighted picks from 50-prompt programme bank · video/Kira/written-style prompts use shorter timers in-session

listing.unique_hook: Interviewer has not read full application; restate goals and motivations clearly.
listing.practice_mechanics: Up to 6 prompts · default 45s prep / 5m15s answer · weighted picks from 50-prompt programme bank · video/Kira/written-style prompts use shorter timers in-session

listing.interview_style_summary: Invitation-only; prerecorded video and/or live remote options.
listing.unique_hook: Defining Leadership Principles as cultural lens; dynamic interview options per official interview page (step4).
listing.interviewer_profile: Student or alum for live remote
listing.practice_mechanics: Up to 6 prompts · default 45s prep / 3 min answer · 7 rotating six-question sets

listing.interview_style_summary: Blind ~30 minute interview + separate video questions (two; ~60 seconds each in handoff).
listing.unique_hook: Video assesses communication; live interview resume-only.
listing.interviewer_profile: Second-year student, recent alum, or admissions committee member
listing.practice_mechanics: Up to 6 prompts · default 45s prep / 4m15s answer · weighted picks from 50-prompt programme bank · video/Kira/written-style prompts use shorter timers in-session

listing.interview_style_summary: Interview with alumni or senior admissions staff; regional; in-person or online.
listing.unique_hook: Admissions video via Kira Talent; interviewer may have read full application.
listing.practice_mechanics: Up to 6 prompts · default 60s prep / 7m30s answer · weighted picks from 50-prompt programme bank · video/Kira/written-style prompts use shorter timers in-session

listing.interview_style_summary: Mandatory Kira video assessment + if pre-selected, two alumni interviews.
listing.unique_hook: Handoff cites Kira pattern: four video questions (45s prep / 60s response) + one written (5 minutes) within 48 hours of deadline; d…
listing.practice_mechanics: Up to 6 prompts · default 45s prep / 5m30s answer · weighted picks from 50-prompt programme bank · video/Kira/written-style prompts use shorter timers in-session
